headline: Goldman Just Raised Its Brent Forecast to $90: 5 Energy Stocks Built for Higher Oil
summary: Goldman Sachs raised its Q4 2026 Brent crude forecast to $90 per barrel on April 27, 2026, up from a prior $80 forecast, citing extreme inventory draws from the prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz tied to the ongoing US-Iran conflict. Brent is already running hot. The benchmark traded above $108 per barrel on ... Goldman Just Raised Its Brent Forecast to $90: 5 Energy Stocks Built for Higher Oil

headline: COP Stock Looks Undervalued Ahead of Q1 Results: Time to Buy?
summary: COP to report Q1 on April 30. Estimates imply lower EPS and revenue, but shares are up 32% and trade at an EV/EBITDA discount.

headline: Stay Ahead of the Game With ConocoPhillips (COP) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street's Insights on Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for ConocoPhillips (COP), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: SCHD: Beating The Market At 3x The Yield
summary: SCHD is beating the S&P 500 in 2026, fueled by energy exposure, attractive value metrics and a 3.44% yield.
